name: Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Kamran Saifullah, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains
SIGMA Description: Detects network connections to Cloudflared tunnels domains initiated by a process on the system.
Attackers can abuse that feature to establish a reverse shell or persistence on a machine.


False positives:
- Legitimate use of cloudflare tunnels will also trigger this.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND Initiated='true' AND (LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%.v2.argotunnel.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%protocol-v2.argotunnel.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%trycloudflare.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%update.argotunnel.com') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND Initiated='true' AND (LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%.v2.argotunnel.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%protocol-v2.argotunnel.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%trycloudflare.com' OR LOWER("Destination Hostname") LIKE '%update.argotunnel.com') AQL filter query
